_comment: Machine-enforced FORM gate only (no truth checks). The polish pass and the cover-letter drafter validate output against this file. Craft the code cannot check (voice, structure, AI-detection tells, reformulate-never-regenerate) lives in shared/voice-guide.md — the drafting brain MUST read that before writing.
banned_words: at the end of the day
ai_detection_tells: versatile-professional opening (results-driven professional with a passion for...)
uniform bullet structure (every bullet: Achieved X by Y, resulting in Z%)
suspiciously round metrics (40%, 30%, 50%) instead of real messy numbers
perfect keyword stuffing (each JD term exactly once, evenly spread)
skills section that lists everything (50 techs, half barely used)
template-identical formatting with zero human imperfection

quality_gates._prose_comment: Free-prose tiers for /api/voice-check. The CV-bullet gate (max 25 words) is a bullet rule and rejects all prose; these tiers scope the word-count check per prose kind so cover paragraphs and screening answers pass.
